programme.title: OOPS! I'M IN JAIL Ep04
programme.desc: Produced and starred by Tony Yang, the story follows rookie guards who face pressure and challenges with humor, courage and budding friendship.

programme.title: OOPS! I'M IN JAIL Ep05
programme.desc: Produced and starred by Tony Yang, the story follows rookie guards who face pressure and challenges with humor, courage and budding friendship.

programme.title: Strange Chronicles Of Tang Ep03
programme.desc: The original cast returns in this micro-drama to explore Chang'an with 2 cases. The Worry-Relief Shop uncovers elite secrets & Song of the Noble House reveals the rigid hierarchies.

programme.title: Strange Chronicles Of Tang Ep04
programme.desc: The original cast returns in this micro-drama to explore Chang'an with 2 cases. The Worry-Relief Shop uncovers elite secrets & Song of the Noble House reveals the rigid hierarchies.

programme.title: The Best Thing Ep24
programme.desc: Warm-hearted doctor He Su Ye's gentle care melts sleepless hotel manager Shen Xi Fan's guarded heart, while his passion for traditional medicine ignites her courage to chase her dreams.

programme.title: The Best Thing Ep25
programme.desc: Warm-hearted doctor He Su Ye's gentle care melts sleepless hotel manager Shen Xi Fan's guarded heart, while his passion for traditional medicine ignites her courage to chase her dreams.

programme.title: A Moment But Forever Ep11
programme.desc: Goddess Wu Shuang searches for the powerful "Hand of God." From rivalry to love with Fox clan priest Yuan Zhong, they unite with the immortals to stop the dark forces & save the 3 realms.

programme.title: A Moment But Forever Ep12
programme.desc: Goddess Wu Shuang searches for the powerful "Hand of God." From rivalry to love with Fox clan priest Yuan Zhong, they unite with the immortals to stop the dark forces & save the 3 realms.

programme.title: A Moment But Forever Ep13
programme.desc: Goddess Wu Shuang searches for the powerful "Hand of God." From rivalry to love with Fox clan priest Yuan Zhong, they unite with the immortals to stop the dark forces & save the 3 realms.

programme.title: A Moment But Forever Ep14
programme.desc: Goddess Wu Shuang searches for the powerful "Hand of God." From rivalry to love with Fox clan priest Yuan Zhong, they unite with the immortals to stop the dark forces & save the 3 realms.

programme.title: Burning Flames Ep15
programme.desc: Based on 'Wu Geng Ji' anime, starring Ren Jia Lun, Xing Fei, Zhu Xu Dan and Zhu Zheng Ting. Prince Wu Geng, enslaved after his kingdom's fall, seeks revenge, leading humans against divine oppression.

programme.title: Burning Flames Ep16
programme.desc: Based on 'Wu Geng Ji' anime, starring Ren Jia Lun, Xing Fei, Zhu Xu Dan and Zhu Zheng Ting. Prince Wu Geng, enslaved after his kingdom's fall, seeks revenge, leading humans against divine oppression.

programme.title: Extras For Chasing The Dragon
programme.desc: Fearless & determined, Wu Guo Hao & his childhood friends smuggle themselves from Guangdong to Hong Kong for a better life, where they rise to dominate both the criminal & law enforcement worlds.

programme.title: Salt Lake Project
programme.desc: A fool searching for his missing lover unexpectedly encounters a rogue who has lost himself. With an old, broken truck, they embark on a journey filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Shuigui Bride
programme.desc: On a stormy night, 8 people gather in a dilapidated temple to take shelter from the rain. They begin discussing the legend of the Water Ghost Bride, kick-starting a series of mysterious murders.

programme.title: Haunted Xiangxi
programme.desc: When a Feng Shui master unexpectedly falls into a trap set by the cunning Gold Old Monster, he is coerced into exploring the ancient tombs of Xiangxi for the monster's nefarious purpose.

programme.title: Horror Legend Of Miao Ling
programme.desc: After the deaths of several people, allegedly from the Gu curse, Lu Wen Liang & Zhang Chi Yi venture into the secluded village in the mountains to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Shell Girl
programme.desc: Upon waking up in a laboratory, a girl finds that she has gained superior fighting skills but lost her memory. Hunted by an unknown man, she has to save herself & rediscover her identity.

programme.title: A Love Never Lost Ep07
programme.desc: Amid chaos, five souls unite in Japan—royalty, rebels, and warriors—witnessing the fall of empire and the birth of a new era. Destiny calls in a revolution that changes China forever.

programme.title: A Love Never Lost Ep08
programme.desc: Amid chaos, five souls unite in Japan—royalty, rebels, and warriors—witnessing the fall of empire and the birth of a new era. Destiny calls in a revolution that changes China forever.

programme.title: Bride And The Beast
programme.desc: Every year, a young girl must be sacrificed to the mountain god or a curse would befall their small village. Two young men must now rescue their beloved when she is chosen to be sacrifice.

programme.title: Snowstorm
programme.desc: After a horrendous shooting incident on the street, Captain Zhou Yu Tong and his apprentice Wang Feng launch an investigation to track down the professional killer.

programme.title: Huang Jin Gui Shi Lu Film Series
programme.desc: With the influential sects at the brink of war, County Chief Lu instructs Chief Detective Duan Guang Long & siblings, Xue Xiao Feng & Xue Xiao Hua, to conduct a secret investigation on the matter.

programme.title: New Dragon Gate Inn
programme.desc: Set in the Ming Dynasty, due to a mysterious imperial edict, the general of the East China Sea, Zhou Huai'an, is tasked to escort orphan Qu Ling to the capital & to await the Ghost Festival.

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Upon discovering his girlfriend's disappearance, virologist Zhang Xuan travels to a foreign country to find her & becoming involved with bringing down conspirators plotting a global pandemic.

programme.title: Baoliezhuiji
programme.desc: Shang Xia is an honest, kind-hearted & funny chauffeur. But his friend, He Feng, is a lustful gambler who often gets into difficult situations that require Shang Xia to bail him out.

programme.title: Xunshou
programme.desc: Fang Chen is a skilled young doctor & a respected driver in the American muscle car club. But an implanted bomb with threat of biological warfare soon throws his life into complete chaos.

programme.title: Desert Lone Hero
programme.desc: The fight for a mystical treasure begins after the death of Shen Shijie, the world's richest businessman, who built an impenetrable vault to seal up his huge wealth.

programme.title: Burning Flames Ep17
programme.desc: Based on 'Wu Geng Ji' anime, starring Ren Jia Lun, Xing Fei, Zhu Xu Dan and Zhu Zheng Ting. Prince Wu Geng, enslaved after his kingdom's fall, seeks revenge, leading humans against divine oppression.

programme.title: Burning Flames Ep18
programme.desc: Based on 'Wu Geng Ji' anime, starring Ren Jia Lun, Xing Fei, Zhu Xu Dan and Zhu Zheng Ting. Prince Wu Geng, enslaved after his kingdom's fall, seeks revenge, leading humans against divine oppression.

programme.title: Restart Tomorrow
programme.desc: Pei Hong Xiao is ordered to lead his teammates in a battle against dangerous mutant creatures while purifying the earth & searching for water contamination chips in the space station.

programme.title: Bath Heaven
programme.desc: In the vibrant yet challenging land of Northeast China, a pair of feuding father and son is at odds over business philosophies, resulting in the son leaving his home.

programme.title: Ghost Mantis 2 Mutation
programme.desc: Entomologist Su Hao is kidnapped & forced to participate in splicing experiments. To halt the inhumane experiments, Su Hao fights in a life-and-death battle against the demonic leader.

programme.title: The Legend Of Man And Loong
programme.desc: The Huan Long family has lived with & fought alongside dragons since ancient times. However, after a betrayal, all the dragon kings were sealed into the Nine Dragon Wall.

programme.title: Second Life
programme.desc: Years ago, a little boy is born in prison and his mother was forced to give him up, losing all contact with him. When she is released, she tries her best to make amends to rebuild their relationship.

programme.title: A Love Never Lost Ep09
programme.desc: Amid chaos, five souls unite in Japan—royalty, rebels, and warriors—witnessing the fall of empire and the birth of a new era. Destiny calls in a revolution that changes China forever.

programme.title: A Love Never Lost Ep10
programme.desc: Amid chaos, five souls unite in Japan—royalty, rebels, and warriors—witnessing the fall of empire and the birth of a new era. Destiny calls in a revolution that changes China forever.

programme.title: Wild Agent 2: Peach Assassination
programme.desc: To invade the global financial system, a criminal organization kidnaps AI expert Fang Li. His wife, Ya Mei, a retired former ATO agent, rejoins the organization to rescue her husband.

programme.title: No information available
programme.desc: No information available

programme.title: Lost Destiny
programme.desc: While journeying to take the imperial exam, scholar Pu Song Ling meets Su Xian, a nine-tailed fox spirit indebted to his kindness in their previous life.

programme.title: Blade Of Fury
programme.desc: Pei Xing is famous for being an 'unkillable' & cold-blooded assassin. But after witnessing great injustice, his dormant chivalry gradually awakens and he decides to retaliate in kind.

programme.title: Island Python
programme.desc: When an unscrupulous organisation made plans to transform the peaceful & tranquil Xiangyang Street into a tourist resort, residents are forced to fight for their home town or relocate.
